title: How AI helps scientists design the next generation of medicines
summary: According to Sapra, AstraZeneca’s engineering teams include data scientists, automation specialists, and AI engineers, who are developing systems that act as “thinking partners” rather than black boxes. “Engineers are designing systems that generate, validate, and learn at speed.
